vulnerabilities.title: Prototype Pollution
vulnerabilities.description: Lodash versions prior to 4.17.19 are vulnerable to Prototype Pollution.

vulnerabilities.title: Weak Key Size
vulnerabilities.description: Affected versions are vulnerable to a weak algorithm usage issue.

vulnerabilities.title: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
vulnerabilities.description: sanitize-html is vulnerable to XSS due to improper sanitization.
